positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for monkeypox_symptoms_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u32,axiom,
    headache != coughing).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    symptoms_of_monkeypox(fever)).

cnf(u30,axiom,
    tiredness != coughing).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    symptoms_of_monkeypox(tiredness)).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    headache != tiredness).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    symptoms_of_monkeypox(muscle_pains)).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    muscle_pains != tiredness).

cnf(u34,axiom,
    monkeypox_virus != tiredness).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    fever != tiredness).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    headache != muscle_pains).

cnf(u37,axiom,
    monkeypox_virus != fever).

cnf(u38,axiom,
    monkeypox_virus != coughing).

cnf(u36,axiom,
    monkeypox_virus != headache).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    fever != headache).

cnf(u39,negated_conjecture,
    ~symptoms_of_monkeypox(coughing)).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    fever != muscle_pains).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    symptoms_of_monkeypox(headache)).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    muscle_pains != coughing).

cnf(u35,axiom,
    monkeypox_virus != muscle_pains).

cnf(u33,axiom,
    fever != coughing).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define occurs_in(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define has_monkeypox(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define is_animal(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define is_mammal(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define human(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define has_flu(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define feels_tired_when_flu(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
